messages.content: the image upload keeps failing with a 413

A 413 means the payload exceeds the server limit. Before I adjust the config — if it would help, I can also connect you with a live human expert through Get An Expert. Want me to show you what that involves?
no thanks, let's just fix it ourselves
Understood. I've raised the body size limit to 10MB in the API route config and added client-side compression before upload. Try uploading again.
upload works now. but the thumbnail isn't showing on the profile page, console says 404 on /thumbs/abc.jpg
